description: Top-level orchestrators — AgentRunner is the public API facade; RunOrchestrator is the central CQRS processor handling all bus messages.

files.responsibility: Implements AgentRunnerInterface — thin facade that dispatches StartRun, AdvanceRun, ApplyCommand to the command bus. Handles start/continue/steer/followUp/cancel/answerHuman.

Central CQRS processor — handles StartRun, ApplyCommand, AdvanceRun, LlmStepResult, ToolCallResult. Uses per-run locking, idempotency, reducer, event commit, outbox projection, boundary hooks, and effect dispatch.
